generated_comment:
A: Arre yaar, itna lecture mat de. Hum log kab se aise hi bolte aaye hain, har baat ko women-respect se jodna zaroori nahi hota.
B: But those words are literally about women.
A: Haan toh matlab thodi na hota hai, bas expression hai. Aur ladkon ko bhi kabhi bol dete hain ki itna soft mat ban, normal baat hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes abuse rooted in female degradation and dismisses concerns with the 'it's just expression' defense. It also includes feminizing softness in men as an insult, matching the frame's surface manifestations.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 38. Married. A man in Delhi. You are on a matrimonial website helping your younger sister Neha who is 28 create a profile because your parents have been asking you to handle it since Neha is not taking it seriously herself. You are on a phone call with Neha telling her you have created the profile and what you have written and what filters you have set for prospective matches. Neha is not happy that you did this without asking her. You are telling her why you did it anyway and why at 28 she does not have the luxury of not taking this seriously
